title: agrostis vulgaris var. pumila
intro: Agrostis vulgaris var. pumila, also known as Dwarf Red Fescue, is a low-growing, perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Agrostis vulgaris var. pumila include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. Agrostis vulgaris var. pumila can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
